---
title: "Lee Gianetti's Homework 4"
output: 
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    orientation: columns
    
    
---

```{css, echo=FALSE}
.fluid-row {
  font-size: 5.9vw;
}
```  

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(flexdashboard) # always
```

## Column {.tabset .tabset-fade}

### Arrest Type Distribution

```{r}
## for del1Draft.rds
link1="https://github.com/dataviz690/hw-4/raw/main/plot1.rds"
readRDS(url(link1))
```

### Age Distribution across Arrest Type

```{r}
## for del2Draft.rds
link2="https://github.com/dataviz690/hw-4/raw/main/plot2.rds"
readRDS(url(link2))
```

### 2020 COVID-19 in South America

```{r}
## for del3Draft.rds
link3="https://github.com/dataviz690/hw-4/raw/main/plot3.rds"
readRDS(url(link3))
```
